solutions.solution: (c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Lakshmi as Married Couple with Rajesh, Rajesh is the father-in-law of Rajan. Raghu is Mother, Babu is Sister, Reema is Married Couple with Rajan. So, it is clear that Rajesh is the father-in-law of Rajan.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing B as Married Couple with D. Father connects to B, Daughter connects to D. Q is Brother, A is Married Couple with S. Mother and S is the brother-in-law of Q. Hence, S is the brother-in-law of Q.
(d) Bhaskar's father. Father (Bhaskar), Daughter Asha. Only son of Bhaskar's father is Bhaskar himself. Therefore, Asha's father is Bhaskar. Hence, Asha is the daughter of Bhaskar.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Mihir's grandparent, Parents, Mihir's parent, Mihir with Sister and Girl. Girl is Mihir's sister. Clearly, only child of Mihir's grandfather is Mihir's father/mother and only daughter of Mihir's father/mother is Mihir's sister. Hence, the girl is Mihir's sister.

(b) Let us draw the family diagram showing Fatima's grandfather, Son, Mustafa's father, Son, Son, Mustafa's brother, Brother, Mustafa, Sister, Fatima. So, it is clear that Fatima is the sister of Mustafa.
(b) Woman's grandfather, Daughter, Rajesh Wife, Daughter, Woman. So, Rajesh is father of that woman.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Prabhu as Brother, Govind as Brother, Ravi as Married Couple, Kusuma. Prabhu is the brother-in-law of Kusuma. Clearly, Prabhu is the brother-in-law of Kusuma.
(b) Let us draw the family diagram showing Jairam as Married couple, Jayanti as daughter, Son, Mother, Brother, Dinesh, Brother, Meeta, Gopal. Now, it is clear that Meeta is Dinesh's mother.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Mathew's mother, Son, Mathew, Daughter, Father, Girl in photograph. Clearly, her father is the only son means Mathew himself and the photograph is of Mathew's daughter.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Married couple F and T, Mother, Father, R as Brother, M as Sister, K as Brother, D as Brother. Clearly, R, M, K and D are the children of T and F in which M is a female and gender of K is not known but R and D are the male children of F and T. Hence, T and F have atleast two sons.

(c) Let us draw the family diagram showing Binod's mother-in-law, Married couple, Daughter, Binod, Binod's wife, Daughter, Girl. Binod is the father of girl. Clearly, Binod's wife's mother's only daughter is Binod's wife and Binod's wife's daughter (the girl in the photograph) will definitely be Binod's daughter. Hence, Binod will be the father of the girl in the photograph.
